hero.badge: The AI deal engine for real estate agents
hero.subtitle: Capture, qualify, follow up, and convert leads 24/7 with your AI-powered growth engine — built specifically for real estate agents.

bullets.speed: Respond to every lead in under 60 seconds
bullets.missed_call: Instantly text back missed calls — never lose a lead again
bullets.focus: Focus only on high-intent buyers & sellers

hero.cta_primary: Get Your AI Deal Engine Started
hero.trial_note: No setup required · 14-day trial on paid plans · Cancel anytime

how.body: LeadSmart AI turns your website visitors and inbound traffic into qualified conversations — and keeps nurturing them until they're ready to close.

growth.h2: Five systems that close more deals — without more hours

capture.title: Capture Every Lead
capture.tagline: Turn anonymous traffic into real opportunities — smart landing pages, home value tools, lead capture forms, and CRM integrations.

qualify.title: Qualify Instantly
qualify.tagline: Know who's serious without lifting a finger — AI lead scoring, intent detection, and smart enrichment do the work.

follow_up.title: Follow Up Automatically
follow_up.tagline: Engage every lead at the perfect moment — SMS + email automation, instant responses, and behavior-based triggers.

convert.title: Convert More Conversations
convert.tagline: Turn engagement into real appointments — AI conversation engine, smart reply suggestions, and one-click booking.

scale.title: Scale Without Limits
scale.tagline: Grow your business without growing your workload — performance analytics, AI optimization, and automated workflows.

missed_call.badge: 📞 Signature feature · part of Follow Up
missed_call.tagline: Turn missed calls into conversations — automatically.
missed_call.body_p1_prefix: When you miss a call, you're not just missing a call —
missed_call.body_p2: LeadSmart AI instantly sends a text back, starts the conversation, and keeps engaging until the lead is ready to talk — then hands off to you at the perfect moment.

styles.h2: Choose how your AI sells for you
styles.subtitle: Every agent has a different style — now your AI can match it.

consultative.name: Consultative Advisor
consultative.body: Builds trust, educates, and nurtures over time. Long-game tone for buyers who need to feel guided through the process.

closer.name: Closer Mode
closer.body: Drives urgency and fast decisions. Direct, action-oriented, designed to convert hot leads before they shop another agent.

connector.name: Friendly Connector
connector.body: Relationship-first. Casual, warm, and personable — the tone that makes first-time buyers actually reply.

styles.tagline: Adapt your AI to your personality — and your market.

appointments.label: More appointments booked
appointments.body: When AI fires the first reply in under 60 seconds, more leads show up to a tour or consultation.

speed.label: Faster lead response
speed.body: Median first-reply time drops from minutes (or hours) to seconds — the difference between you and the next agent.

conversion.label: Higher conversion rates
conversion.body: Behavior-based follow-up keeps warm leads engaged through the silent middle of the funnel.

results.disclaimer: Estimates based on internal pilots. Your numbers will move when speed-to-lead drops below 60 seconds and follow-up cadence runs automatically.

missed_call_hook.h3: Missed a call? You may have missed a deal.
missed_call_hook.body: LeadSmart AI responds instantly when you can't — and turns missed calls into real opportunities.

missed_after_hours.right: AI replies the moment they hit submit

no_coaching.right: Producer Track + Top Producer Track included

roi.body: If you miss follow-ups, respond late, or forget to nurture leads — you're losing deals every month.

bullets.first_responder: Hot leads going to the agent who responded first
bullets.broken_sequences: Follow-up sequences breaking after the second message
bullets.equity_threshold: Sphere contacts crossing equity thresholds without a nudge

final.h2: Your next deal is already visiting your website.
final.subtitle: Don't let it slip away.
final.footer_note: 14-day trial on paid plans · No credit card required to start
